---
title: "check_features"
format: html
---

# open up clean data file

# load packages

# source training_controls_panel.R for access to format_data and build_recipe
```{r}
source("./_chtc/training_controls_panel.R")
```

```{r}

# make a loop here for each of 3
config <- tibble(algorithm = "glmnet", feature_set = "base")

path_data <- format_path("llmpanel/data_processed/")
path_trn <- "panel_long.csv"
df <- read_csv(file.path(path_data, path_trn))

df <- df |> format_data(config)

rec <- build_recipe(df, config)

rec_prep <- rec |> prep(training = df)

train <- rec_prep |> bake(new_data = NULL)

```
